summary: TSLA CSP $360 is today's best setup — richest premium, deep support cushion
All three: wait on LEAPs — TSLA closest, needs RSI <35 or $381 test
No covered calls today — none are overbought, avoid selling into weakness
body:
📊 Daily Options Analysis — Monday, March 16, 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Assumptions:
• Conviction: Moderate for all three tickers
• Capital: Enough for 1 CSP (100 shares) per ticker
• Cost basis (CC): Current price (no existing position)
• LEAP thesis: Long-term bullish on AI/earnings growth
• IV Rank: Using IV/HV1y ratio as proxy (Barchart IV rank not accessible)

3-Consecutive-Red-Days Check:
• GOOG: No ✅ — bounced +0.21% today
• NVDA: No ✅ — bounced +2.09% today
• TSLA: No ✅ — bounced +1.41% today

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

═══ GOOG — $302.03 ═══

Technical Snapshot:
RSI14 Daily: 40.0 | RSI14 Weekly: 45.8
Daily S/R (20d): $293.93 / $319.23
Daily S/R (60d): $293.93 / $349.90
Weekly S/R (12w): $293.93 / $349.90
Weekly S/R (26w): $236.36 / $349.90
HV20: 22.2% | HV1y: 29.8%
ATM IV (31 DTE): 30.8% | IV/HV1y: 1.03x

1) Strategy Selector
IV environment is neutral — IV/HV1y at 1.03x means implied vol is roughly in line with realized. Not elevated enough to make premium selling highly attractive, but not cheap enough to scream "buy options." With moderate conviction and RSI at 40 (mildly weak but not oversold), a small CSP near support is reasonable if you'd want to own shares at that level. LEAPs not ideal yet.
Recommendation: Modest CSP is acceptable. Hold off on LEAP. No urgency.

2) Cash-Secured Put — Strike $280
Expiry: Apr 17 (31 DTE) | Delta: -0.19
Bid/Ask: $3.65 / $3.70 | Mid Premium: $3.67/sh ($368/contract)
Cost Basis if Assigned: $276.32
Capital Required: $28,000 | OI: 7,916
The $280 strike sits below the 20-day low of $293.93 — a solid 7.3% below current price. At -0.19 delta, roughly 81% probability of expiring worthless. Premium yield is modest at 1.3% on capital for 31 days (~15% annualized).
Verdict: Decent setup. Acceptable if you'd happily own GOOG at $276.

3) Covered Call — Strike $325
Expiry: Apr 17 (31 DTE) | Delta: +0.21
Bid/Ask: $2.90 / $2.95 | Mid Premium: $2.92/sh ($292/contract)
Capital Gain if Called: $22.97/sh | Total Profit: $25.89/sh ($2,589/100 shares)
Nearest Resistance: $349.90 | OI: 3,088
RSI at 40 is not overbought — stock is weak. Selling a call here while momentum is bearish risks capping upside for only $292.
Verdict: Marginal. Wait for a rally toward $320+ and RSI above 60.

4) LEAP Entry Checklist
Expiry: Mar 19, 2027 (367 DTE) | Strike: $275 | Delta: 0.70
Bid/Ask: $62.20 / $65.00 | Mid: $63.60 ($6,360/contract)
Spread: $2.80 (4.4% of mid) | OI: 97 | Leverage: 4.7x
☑ Conviction to add on 10% drop? Borderline at moderate conviction.
☐ RSI oversold? Daily 40 not oversold. Weekly 45.8 neutral. Not met.
☐ Near support? $302 above $293.93 cluster. Partially met.
☐ IV low? 1.03x is neutral. Not met.
☑ Liquidity? OI 97 low but spread 4.4% manageable.
Verdict: 2 of 5 met. Wait for RSI <35 or price to test $294 support.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

═══ NVDA — $184.01 ═══

Technical Snapshot:
RSI14 Daily: 42.0 | RSI14 Weekly: 57.2
Daily S/R (20d): $174.63 / $197.62
Daily S/R (60d): $170.30 / $197.62
Weekly S/R (12w): $171.02 / $197.62
Weekly S/R (26w): $169.53 / $212.17
HV20: 36.2% | HV1y: 41.2%
ATM IV (31 DTE): 38.6% | IV/HV1y: 0.94x

1) Strategy Selector
IV is slightly below historical — IV/HV1y at 0.94x means options priced slightly cheap. This tilts toward buying rather than selling. But with moderate conviction and RSI at 42 (not oversold), neither direction screams urgency.
Recommendation: Wait. Not ideal for CSP (IV below HV) and not oversold enough for LEAP. Watch for $174-171 support test.

2) Cash-Secured Put — Strike $165
Expiry: Apr 17 (31 DTE) | Delta: -0.17
Bid/Ask: $2.62 / $2.65 | Mid Premium: $2.63/sh ($264/contract)
Cost Basis if Assigned: $162.37
Capital Required: $16,500 | OI: 27,807
Excellent support zone with massive OI. Premium yield only 1.6% for 31 days — selling cheap premium since IV below HV.
Verdict: Strike location excellent but premium thin. Acceptable if assignment is the real play.

3) Covered Call — Strike $205
Expiry: Apr 17 (31 DTE) | Delta: +0.17
Bid/Ask: $1.72 / $1.75 | Mid Premium: $1.73/sh ($174/contract)
Capital Gain if Called: $20.99/sh | Total Profit: $22.73/sh ($2,273/100 shares)
RSI daily at 42 is not overbought. Stock bounced +2% today.
Verdict: Skip. RSI not overbought, premium barely covers commissions. Wait for RSI >60.

4) LEAP Entry Checklist
Expiry: Mar 19, 2027 (367 DTE) | Strike: $165 | Delta: 0.71
Bid/Ask: $46.35 / $46.55 | Mid: $46.45 ($4,645/contract)
Spread: $0.20 (0.4% of mid) | OI: 469 | Leverage: 4.0x
☑ Conviction on 10% drop? Yes for AI bulls.
☐ RSI oversold? Daily 42, Weekly 57. Not met.
☐ Near support? $184 mid-range. Not met.
☐ IV low? 0.94x borderline.
☑ Liquidity? Excellent — spread 0.4%.
Verdict: 2 of 5 met. Wait for RSI <35 or pullback to $170-174.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

═══ TSLA — $396.64 ═══

Technical Snapshot:
RSI14 Daily: 43.0 | RSI14 Weekly: 31.4 ⚠️
Daily S/R (20d): $381.40 / $420.34
Daily S/R (60d): $381.40 / $498.83
Weekly S/R (12w): $381.40 / $469.40
Weekly S/R (26w): $381.40 / $498.83
HV20: 30.0% | HV1y: 56.8%
ATM IV (31 DTE): 43.5% | IV/HV1y: 0.77x

1) Strategy Selector
Most interesting setup. Weekly RSI 31.4 approaching oversold. TSLA hammered from $498 to $396 (20% drawdown). IV/HV1y at 0.77x means options notably cheap vs realized vol — favors buying over selling.
Recommendation: Watchlist moment. Conditions building for LEAP. Wait for daily RSI <30 or price to hold $381 support on retest. CSP at deep support to get paid to wait.

2) Cash-Secured Put — Strike $360
Expiry: Apr 17 (31 DTE) | Delta: -0.21
Bid/Ask: $7.55 / $7.65 | Mid Premium: $7.60/sh ($760/contract)
Cost Basis if Assigned: $352.40
Capital Required: $36,000 | OI: 4,921
Strike 9.2% below current, well below $381.40 support. Premium yield 2.1% for 31 days (~25% annualized) — best of three tickers.
Verdict: Best CSP setup today. Strong premium, deep below support. Only sell if genuinely bullish at $352.

3) Covered Call — Strike $445
Expiry: Apr 17 (31 DTE) | Delta: +0.20
Bid/Ask: $5.10 / $5.25 | Mid Premium: $5.17/sh ($518/contract)
Capital Gain if Called: $48.36/sh | Total Profit: $53.53/sh ($5,353/100 shares)
RSI daily 43 not overbought. TSLA in downtrend off $498.
Verdict: Don't sell calls in a downtrend. Wait for relief rally and RSI >55.

4) LEAP Entry Checklist
Expiry: Mar 19, 2027 (367 DTE) | Strike: $360 | Delta: 0.70
Bid/Ask: $103.35 / $105.30 | Mid: $104.32 ($10,432/contract)
Spread: $1.95 (1.9% of mid) | OI: 77 | Leverage: 3.8x
☑ Conviction on 10% drop? Yes for AI/robotaxi thesis.
☐ RSI oversold? Daily 43 no. Weekly 31.4 nearly oversold. Partially met.
☑ Near support? $396 very close to $381 (multi-timeframe confluence). Met.
☑ IV low? 0.77x — options cheap vs realized. Met.
☐ Liquidity? OI 77 low, spread 1.9% acceptable. Borderline.
Verdict: 3 of 5 met (most today). Closest to LEAP entry. Trigger: daily RSI <35 or $381 test+hold. Set alerts.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Quick Summary:
• TSLA CSP $360 is today's best setup — richest premium, deep support
• All three: wait on LEAPs — TSLA closest, needs RSI <35 or $381 test
• No covered calls today — none overbought, avoid selling into weakness

Not financial advice.
